author: garyrong
content:
> while updating a slot still applies a storage write fee
shouldn't it be handled by returning the gas back to the global refund counter?

author: gaxanh
content: What I mean is comparing updating a slot (not clearing) with clearing a slot and creating a slot. For instance, if you clear two slots and create three slots, you only incur account write fees for the two swapped slot pairs (e.g., 2 * STORAGE_WRITE—similar to updating two slots, since only the value exchanges, there are no state creation fees or refunds involved), the remaining slot incurs the state creation fee. Conversely, if there is a net reduction in the number of slots (i.e., more slots are cleared than created), you receive a refund corresponding to the number of cleared slots
